summary.lv: Wandoo Finance meklē Service Desk Engineer, kurš/a apstrādās incidentus un pakalpojumu pieprasījumus, administrēs M365 vidi un darbosies kā pirmais eskalācijas punkts globālā fintech uzņēmumā.
summary.en: Wandoo Finance is looking for a Service Desk Engineer to own incident resolution end-to-end, administer M365 and endpoints, and serve as the first real escalation point in a global fintech company with offices across Europe and LATAM.
